name: Jalapeno Potato Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Julienne the potatoes with their skins on.
2. Lightly beat the eggs.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients and pat into 5-ounce cakes.
4. Pan sauté each cake in the chosen oil until golden brown.
5. Serve with flavored or non-flavored sour cream and top with caviar.
